title: Add support for 'podman system service' on FreeBSD
body:
This adds the 'system service' command to the build and includes small refactors to enable the build and conform to local conventions for unix domain socket paths.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Add support for the podman remote API on FreeBSD.
```

I see this PR is tagged for 4.6 - does that mean it will be automatically merged to the v4.6 branch or should I make a cherry-pick PR?

@dfr: only [containers](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) org members may request cherry picks. You can still do the cherry-pick manually.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19049#issuecomment-1615828178):

>/cherry-pick v4.6

If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
